title: "editor.cursorSmoothCaretAnimation": "on",
content:
"editor.cursorSmoothCaretAnimation": "on",
"workbench.startupEditor": "none",
"files.autoSave": "onFocusChange",
"editor.formatOnSave": true
}
```
(Adjust accent hex to match your preferred highlight.)

**Optional Lightweight Enhancements (Still Low Overhead)**
- `"workbench.list.smoothScrolling": true`
- `"editor.minimap.enabled": false` (saves GPU if not needed)
- `"window.titleBarStyle": "custom"` (consistent dark look)

**Uninstall Commands (Example)**
```bash
# Cosmetic/UI extensions to remove
code-insiders --uninstall-extension johnpapa.vscode-peacock || true
code-insiders --uninstall-extension drcika.apc-extension || true
code-insiders --uninstall-extension brandonkirbyson.vscode-animations || true
code-insiders --uninstall-extension richardluo.frosted-glass-theme || true
code-insiders --uninstall-extension ezze.dynamic-base16 || true
code-insiders --uninstall-extension sykeben.vscode-vibrancy || true
